admissions_process.summary: LGU's graduate admissions flow is centralized on the admissions and graduate studies pages: applicants submit an online application, upload required documents, pay the application fee, and complete an interview if required.
steps: Submit the official online graduate application.
Complete an interview if the program requires it.
Await the admission decision from the university.

required_documents.summary: LGU lists a small graduate admissions checklist on the graduate studies page and supporting documentation on the financial-aid forms and FAQ pages.
items: Bachelor's degree from an accredited institution
Employment or income-related documents when applying for aid
Copy of ID or passport where applicable

language_requirements.summary: The graduate studies page requires GRE or GMAT depending on program, and the page/FAQ content indicates graduate instruction is offered in English or French with German as an additional asset. No graduate threshold was published.
notes: No official graduate TOEFL/IELTS/DELF threshold was published in the recovered source set.
The language references are program-level and general, not a graduate-wide numeric requirement.

tuition_model.summary: LGU did not publish a dedicated graduate tuition table or per-credit graduate tuition schedule in the recovered official source set.
tuition_model.notes: The undergraduate tuition page provides undergraduate fees only and must not be reused for graduate programs.

application_fee.notes: The graduate application flow includes a payment step for the application fee, but no numeric amount was published in the reviewed official pages.

registration_fee.notes: The reviewed official pages reference registration timing and registrar services, but no graduate registration amount was published.

payment_methods.summary: LGU's admissions and financial-aid materials reference installment or flexible payment arrangements, but no official graduate payment-method matrix was published.
items: Flexible or installment payment references in financial-aid material

payment_plans.summary: The financial-aid documents and FAQ mention flexible settlement or monthly payment references, but no detailed graduate plan table was published.
items: Monthly payment references in aid forms

scholarships.summary: LGU's financial-aid page and forms reference scholarship and aid categories, including merit and athletic support and work-study references.

financial_aid.summary: LGU publishes financial-aid guidance and application forms for students, including aid-related document requirements and payment-plan references.

academic_calendar.summary: LGU publishes an official academic calendar page with registration, term, and exam timing. The discovered 2025-2026 calendar is the canonical calendar source for the university.

graduate_regulations.summary: No standalone graduate regulations handbook or catalog was recovered. The graduate studies page provides the official admission-rule baseline for the graduate inventory.
items: Bachelor's degree from an accredited institution
GRE or GMAT depending on program

international_students.summary: LGU's FAQ references international-student topics, including registration documents and visa-related questions, but no dedicated graduate international policy page was recovered.
items: Language and document questions handled through the general FAQ

accreditation.summary: No explicit institutional or graduate accreditation statement was recovered in the reviewed official source set.
